ambiguities.description: Documents and files access, upload, and sharing
Support request submission, tracking, and escalation
Billing visibility and payment history access
Integration with internal systems (CRM, billing, support)
Auditability of customer actions and data access
MVP self-service boundary: what customers can do without staff intervention

questions.question: What customer identity and authentication model is required?
What account and profile management can customers perform?
What documents and files should customers access or upload?
What support request capabilities are needed?
What notification types and channels are needed?
Can customers invite or manage delegated users?
What internal systems must the portal integrate with?
What branding and localization requirements apply?
What is the MVP self-service boundary?

assumptions.assumption: Customers have a single primary account with optional sub-users
Billing mutations require staff approval or external verification

suggested_closures.decision: Customer portal construction will treat identity, data access, and mutation as separate layers with explicit approval gates for sensitive actions.
suggested_closures.rationale: Self-service must not compromise data integrity or billing accuracy; separation enables safe delegation.

seed_tasks.title: Define customer identity and authentication model
seed_tasks.transformation: Document auth methods, registration flow, and identity verification.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Identity model is documented with flow diagrams.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A developer can implement authentication from the document alone.

seed_tasks.title: Map self-service capabilities and approval gates
seed_tasks.transformation: List what customers can do directly vs what requires staff approval.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every capability has defined access rules and approval gates where needed.

seed_tasks.title: Define integration contracts with internal systems
seed_tasks.transformation: Document APIs, data sync, and error handling for internal system integrations.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every integration has defined request/response contracts and failure semantics.

residuals.description: Customer identity and authentication model is not selected.
Self-service capabilities and boundaries are undefined.
Internal system integrations are not documented.
Delegated user permissions are not defined.
Localization and branding requirements are not documented.
